alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services in global commercial operations and transformation programs; designed and scoped LLM coding agents; built dashboards in Looker; proficient SQL and BigQuery querying for data-driven analysis
alignments.job_requirement: Experience demonstrating value through business data analysis, business process improvement and software deployment, ideally in customer-facing Solution Consulting or IT/Management Consulting with SaaS providers

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs at Google; demonstrated product ownership through requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and enterprise-wide change initiatives; positioned as transformation leader scaling global operations
alignments.job_requirement: Experience in identifying use cases for business process improvement, deploying improvement measures, being a change agent, and training users to realize value

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial Operations background (translatable to Revenue Operations in finance/operations functions); eight years scaling global commercial operations suggests domain depth in finance-adjacent operational functions
alignments.job_requirement: Understanding of Finance and/or Supply Chain domain and strategic transformation initiatives such as Shared Services Transformation

alignments.candidate_evidence: Salesforce admin experience managing territory budgets; proficient SQL with joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, CTEs, window functions; writes BigQuery queries; builds Looker dashboards; basic Python (data-analysis/pandas, actively learning); owns LLM/agentic-tooling design and evaluation
alignments.job_requirement: Good knowledge of Business Software/SaaS applications (e.g. SAP); experience with implementing RPA and/or BI Tools and/or building dashboards/apps; knowledge of Python and/or SQL and AI

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global programs; led transformation programs and commercial operations; positioned as operations leader managing complex cross-functional delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Experience in planning and managing project scopes, expectations, and timelines; managing multiple projects across aligned accounts at different parts of the value journey

alignments.candidate_evidence: Positioned as Strategy and Operations leader; translated Commercial Operations into business impact narratives; eight years managing stakeholder engagement in global operations
alignments.job_requirement: Experience in preparing and communicating value roadmaps and results to stakeholders and management; excellent communication and presentation skills

gaps.gap: No stated customer-facing Solution Consulting or SaaS presales/value engineering background; experience is internal operations and transformation, not external customer advisory
gaps.mitigation: Customer-advisory and change-agent skills transfer from internal transformation work; analytical and business-case-building capabilities demonstrated via dashboards, SQL analysis, and process-improvement leadership. Ramp-up on Celonis-specific domain (process mining, use cases) required but foundational skills present.

gaps.gap: Finance and Supply Chain domain expertise not explicitly stated; Commercial Operations background is adjacent but may not cover manufacturing/automotive supply chain or shared-services transformation depth
gaps.mitigation: Eight years in global operations provides operational-thinking foundation; Celonis ramp includes industry-specific workshops and mentoring. Demonstrated ability to learn complex domains and translate data to business impact mitigates pure domain gap.

gaps.gap: No stated experience with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle) or RPA platform deployment; Salesforce and BI tool experience is present but not the core enterprise-system integration layer
gaps.mitigation: SQL, BigQuery, and data-integration mindset demonstrate ability to work with complex data architectures; Salesforce admin experience shows SaaS platform literacy. RPA and ERP knowledge can be built through onboarding.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated consulting-brand or case-team problem-solving background; acknowledged in honest_gaps as limited classic consulting experience
gaps.mitigation: Strategic transformation and process-improvement leadership at Google substitutes for consulting framework rigor; analytical skills and stakeholder management demonstrated. Value Engineer role is more execution-focused than pure strategy consulting.

output.level_rationale: The JD describes full end-to-end customer value ownership, account expansion, senior stakeholder engagement (C-level), and cross-functional partnership with Sales. Language like "Lead" and responsibility for landing, expanding, adopting, and renewing suggests mid-to-senior IC scope without explicit manager-of-people responsibility, mapping to L4 (Senior Manager / Senior IC) in typical SaaS consulting roles. No reporting line or company size stated, slightly lowering confidence.
output.summary: Candidate brings eight years of strategic transformation and global operations leadership with strong analytical and change-management credentials. Core gaps are external customer-advisory experience (role is presales/customer-success hybrid), manufacturing/automotive supply-chain domain depth, and ERP/RPA platform familiarity. However, demonstrated SQL, BigQuery, dashboarding, Salesforce admin, Python learning, and agentic-tooling ownership address analytics and tool requirements. The role level (L4) aligns with candidate's target band; fit depends on willingness to ramp customer-advisory and domain skills alongside proven execution strength.
